HSN Code Finder Updated 2026

What is an HSN Code? An HSN (Harmonized System of Nomenclature) code is a uniform code that classifies over 12,000 products for taxation purposes. Use our free hsn code finder updated 2026 to instantly search by code or description and find the exact GST slab. (Looking for state codes? Use our gst state code list finder).

Complete Guide to HSN and SAC Codes in 2026

Proper classification of goods and services is the backbone of GST compliance. When you generate an e-way bill or an e-invoice, entering the correct code ensures you charge the right tax rate and avoids penalties from the tax authorities.

What is the Mandatory HSN Code limit?

The CBIC (Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs) mandates the number of digits you must mention on your tax invoices based on your Annual Aggregate Turnover (AATO) in the preceding financial year:

  • Turnover up to ₹5 Crore: 4-digit HSN code is mandatory for B2B tax invoices. It is optional for B2C invoices.
  • Turnover above ₹5 Crore: 6-digit HSN code is mandatory for all invoices (B2B and B2C).

How to use the GST HSN Code Finder

Our hsn code finder updated 2026 makes it incredibly easy. You can browse by over 20 categories or start typing in the search bar. Whether you need a 4 digit hsn code finder, a 6 digit hsn code list, or the highly specific 8 digit hsn code india directory, you can search using the numeric code (e.g., 8517) or by simply describing the item (e.g., mobile phone). The tool instantly filters the entire Indian tariff schedule locally on your device, without sending your search data to any server.

Disclaimer: While we strive to keep our database of 12,000+ codes current for 2026, GST rates and classifications are frequently updated during GST Council meetings. Always verify against official CBIC notifications before raising a high-value tax invoice.
